mapper.insert: insert into routing_decisions() values(#{decision.decisionId},#{decision.taskId},#{decision.incidentId},#{decision.routingPolicy},#{decision.status},#{decision.selectedAgentId},#{decision.selectedGatewayNodeId},#{decision.selectedAgentSessionId},#{decision.selectedSiteId},#{decision.selectedScore},#{decision.decisionReason},coalesce(cast(#{decision.userFacingErrorJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb),coalesce(cast(#{decision.candidatesJson} as jsonb), '[]'::jsonb),#{decision.createdAt}) on conflict(decision_id) do update set status=excluded.status,selected_agent_id=excluded.selected_agent_id,selected_gateway_node_id=excluded.selected_gateway_node_id,selected_agent_session_id=excluded.selected_agent_session_id,selected_site_id=excluded.selected_site_id,selected_score=excluded.selected_score,decision_reason=excluded.decision_reason,user_facing_error_json=excluded.user_facing_error_json,candidates_json=excluded.candidates_json
mapper.select: select from routing_decisions where task_id=#{taskId} order by created_at desc limit #{limit}
select from routing_decisions order by created_at desc limit #{limit}
